title: terpsichore exornans
intro: Terpsichore exornans, also known as the 'decorated terpsichore' or 'decorated fern', is a species of fern native to South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Terpsichore exornans include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for topical and internal use to harness its medicinal properties.
